movie.actors: Robert Carradine, Billy Dee Williams, Valerie Bertinelli, Peter Graves
movie.plot: A pair of detectives is assigned to investigate a murder, and discover a trail of corruption and criminal activity that leads right back to their own police department.
movie.title: Number One with a Bullet
movie.writer: Gail Morgan Hickman (story), Gail Morgan Hickman (screenplay), Andrew Kurtzman (screenplay), Rob Riley (screenplay), Jim Belushi (screenplay)
